results.input: May 17 08:24:39 auth-01 sshd[3146]: Failed password for admin from 192.0.2.105 port 34263 ssh2; repeated 11 times in 5 minutes

results.input: 2026-05-17T19:00:50+07:00 api-gateway: GET /api/users?id=9 AND SLEEP(5) src=198.51.100.169 status=500 upstream_ms=3904
